_metadata.title: AI systems already placed on the market or put into service and general-purpose AI models already placed on the market

obligations.source_quote: Without prejudice to the application of Article 5 as referred to in Article 113(3), point (a), AI systems which are components of the large-scale IT systems established by the legal acts listed in Annex X that have been placed on the market or put into service before 2 August 2027 shall be brought into compliance with this Regulation by 31 December 2030.
obligations.addressee_note: Operators of AI systems that are components of Annex X large-scale IT systems

decomposed_atoms.description: Annex X large-scale IT system AI components placed on market before 2 Aug 2027 must be compliant by 31 Dec 2030
decomposed_atoms.requirement: AI systems that are components of Annex X large-scale IT systems placed on the market before 2 August 2027 SHALL be brought into compliance by 31 December 2030

automation_assessment.what_to_scan: System deployment date, Annex X classification, compliance timeline tracking

obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies to AI systems that are components of Annex X large-scale IT systems placed on market before 2 August 2027

obligations.source_quote: Without prejudice to the application of Article 5 as referred to in Article 113(3), point (a), this Regulation shall apply to operators of high-risk AI systems, other than the systems referred to in paragraph 1 of this Article, that have been placed on the market or put into service before 2 August 2026, only if, as from that date, those systems are subject to significant changes in their designs. In any case, the providers and deployers of high-risk AI systems intended to be used by public authorities shall take the necessary steps to comply with the requirements and obligations of this Regulation by 2 August 2030.
obligations.addressee_note: Providers and deployers of high-risk AI systems used by public authorities

decomposed_atoms.description: Pre-existing high-risk systems only need to comply if significantly changed after 2 Aug 2026
decomposed_atoms.requirement: This Regulation SHALL apply to pre-existing high-risk AI systems only if, from 2 August 2026, they are subject to significant changes in their designs

decomposed_atoms.description: Public authority high-risk AI systems must comply by 2 August 2030
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Providers and deployers of high-risk AI systems intended for public authority use SHALL comply by 2 August 2030

automation_assessment.what_to_scan: System deployment date, modification history, public authority classification, compliance timeline

obligations.source_quote: Providers of general-purpose AI models that have been placed on the market before 2 August 2025 shall take the necessary steps in order to comply with the obligations laid down in this Regulation by 2 August 2027.
obligations.addressee_note: Providers of general-purpose AI models placed on the market before 2 August 2025

decomposed_atoms.description: GPAI models placed on market before 2 Aug 2025 must comply by 2 Aug 2027
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Providers of general-purpose AI models placed on the market before 2 August 2025 SHALL comply by 2 August 2027

automation_assessment.what_to_scan: GPAI model deployment date, compliance status, Chapter V obligation compliance
